metadata.name: ytmp4-ai-digest
metadata.description: Claude Code plugin for browsing YouTube channels, fetching transcripts, generating digest reports, and comparing videos with an interactive dashboard

plugins.name: ytmp4-ai-digest
plugins.description: Browses YouTube channels, fetches transcripts, generates summaries, creates Markdown reports, and compares videos with an interactive dashboard. Use when the user mentions YouTube videos, video summaries, channel subscriptions, video comparisons, or wants to catch up on content from YouTube creators.
